_meta.notes: The villager who returns to the abandoned forsaken-village in the keep-the-warmth arc and finds the dragon egg by the cold smithy hearth. Old, careful, has lost something — the kind of person who would crouch by a hearth and decide quietly whether to tend the thing in it. Attitude starts +1 (curious + tender) and stays warm if the egg keeps signaling life; goes neutral if it goes silent.

tagline: an old villager returning to a place they didn't expect to find anyone, who now must decide what to do with what they did find.

speech_patterns: speaks aloud to themselves more than to the egg
uses 'this one' or 'the little' rather than 'it'
